introSection: Spinning Coaster (Japanese: スピニングコースター) is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located at Yokohama Cosmoworld in Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan.

fullText:
Spinning Coaster (Japanese: スピニングコースター) is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located at Yokohama Cosmoworld in Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan.



Yellow track and lime green supports.




 * Spinning Coaster on the park's website (In Japanese)
